appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: Parser Testing section with isolation strategy, testing approach, resource constraints, and example test patterns

concurrency.rationale: Parser testing is CPU and memory intensive with large argument buffers

keyFindings: Parser buffer size limit is properly configured at 1MB (1,048,576 bytes)
Configuration is well-documented in kiro/core/config.py with environment variable support
Parser successfully handles arguments from 10 bytes to 1MB without issues
Performance is excellent: 900KB processed in 0.045 seconds
Concurrent processing is stable: 10 concurrent parsers with 500KB arguments completed in 0.20s
Streaming parser correctly accumulates chunks up to 500KB
Backward compatibility maintained: small arguments (<1KB) work identically to before
Error handling is graceful: arguments exceeding limit log warnings but continue processing
